config.questsPerDay.tooltip: How many quests appear on the help-wanted board each day.
config.difficultyScaling.tooltip: When on, harder quest variants unlock based on your skill levels.
config.consequences.tooltip: When on, certain quests can affect NPC friendships positively or negatively.
config.moddedItems.tooltip: Lets quest objectives and rewards reference items added by other mods.
config.moddedNPCs.tooltip: Lets modded NPCs (Ridgeside, East Scarp, Visit Mount Vapius, SVE) appear as quest givers.
config.festivalQuests.tooltip: Adds pre-festival quest chains in the days leading up to each festival.
config.animalQuests.tooltip: Enables Marnie's animal quest chain after building coops or barns.
config.secretGiftHint.tooltip: Adds a quest that hints at your Winter Star recipient's preferences. Disable if you'd rather not be spoiled.
config.FriendshipBasic.tooltip: Small reward (default 30, about 12% of a heart).
config.FriendshipMid.tooltip: Default 80, about a third of a heart.
config.FriendshipMultiSmall.tooltip: Per-NPC amount when rewarding multiple NPCs at once.
config.FriendshipMultiHeart.tooltip: Per-NPC amount for festival quests rewarding all NPCs in a village mod.
config.GoldExpertBase.tooltip: Reward for expert / Grand Feast scale quests.
config.RewardMultiplierBelowSell.tooltip: Reward = item sell price x this. Used for high-volume bulk quests like Massive Harvest.
config.RewardMultiplierAboveSell.tooltip: Reward = item sell price x this. Used for cooking and artisan delivery quests.
config.RewardMultiplierFishPremium.toolt: Reward = fish sell price x this. Used for expert fishing hauls.
config.ShopDiscountPercent.tooltip: Discount applied to a shop after a fishing festival quest.
config.ShopDiscountDurationDays.tooltip: How many days the festival fishing shop discount stays active.
config.SeedShopDiscountPercent.tooltip: Discount on quested seeds at Pierre's after Pierre's Stock-Up.
config.SeedShopDiscountDurationDays.tool: How many days the seed shop discount stays active.
config.DeadlineShort.tooltip: Tight deadline for festival prep and urgent daily quests.
config.DeadlineLong.tooltip: Extended deadline for advanced or multi-step quests.
config.DeadlineExtended.tooltip: Long deadline for rare-trigger quests where the item is hard to obtain.
config.FishHaulMediumQty.tooltip: Catch count for medium-tier fishing hauls.
config.FishHaulLargeQty.tooltip: Catch count for expert-tier fishing hauls.
config.FestivalFishQty.tooltip: Catch count for SquidFest and Trout Derby.
config.CropMassiveQty.tooltip: Crop count for Massive Harvest order.
config.HaySupplyBaseQty.tooltip: Base hay before animal-count scaling for Marnie's hay run.
config.SkullCavernMaxLevel.tooltip: Maximum floor target for Skull Cavern Deep Dive quests.
quest.farming.basic.title: {{npc}}'s crop request
quest.farming.basic.description: {{npc}} is asking for {{qty}} {{item}}. Bring them by before the deadline.
quest.fishing.simple.title: Fresh catch needed
quest.fishing.simple.description: Willy's looking for {{qty}} {{item}}. Bring them by before the deadline.
quest.fishing.simple.targetMessage: Perfect, exactly what I was after.
quest.mining.slime.title: Slime trouble
quest.mining.slime.description: Marlon wants someone to clear out {{qty}} green slimes in the mines.
quest.mining.slime.targetMessage: That'll keep the mine quiet for a while. Thanks.
quest.mining.bar.title: Clint needs bars
quest.mining.bar.description: Clint needs {{qty}} {{item}} for an order he's working on.
quest.mining.bar.targetMessage: These are perfect, thanks for getting them so fast.
quest.foraging.seasonal.title: {{npc}}'s foraging request
quest.foraging.seasonal.description: {{npc}} is putting together a stock of {{qty}} {{item}}.
quest.foraging.seasonal.targetMessage: Wonderful, thank you for finding these.
quest.social.elliott.title: A token of inspiration
quest.social.elliott.description: Elliott would love a {{item}} for poetic inspiration.
quest.social.elliott.targetMessage: Beautiful. This will fit right into my next piece.
quest.social.george.title: Check on George
quest.social.george.description: Evelyn is worried about George. Take some bread by their place and report back.
quest.social.george.objective: Deliver bread to George (and let Evelyn know how he's doing).
quest.social.george.targetMessage: Thank you for looking in on him.
quest.animal.hay.title: Hay supply run
quest.animal.hay.description: Marnie's stocking up the ranch and needs {{qty}} hay before the week is out.
quest.animal.hay.targetMessage: Perfect, that'll keep the ranch fed. Thanks.
quest.seasonal.beach.title: {{npc}}'s beach cleanup
quest.seasonal.beach.description: {{npc}} wants to tidy up the beach. Bring back {{qty}} {{item}}.
quest.seasonal.beach.targetMessage: Looks great, thanks for clearing those out.
quest.seasonal.springtea.title: {{npc}}'s spring tea
quest.seasonal.springtea.description: {{npc}} wants to make a batch of spring tea and needs {{qty}} {{item}}.
quest.cooking.craving.title: {{npc}} is craving a meal
quest.cooking.craving.description: {{npc}} would love some {{item}}. Bring it over fresh.
quest.cooking.craving.targetMessage: Oh, that smells amazing. Thank you!
